license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x76frre
title: Serial Dilution of Nucleofected iPSC Pools
author: Celeste M M. Karch

steps_raw.instruction: Coat 3 wells of a 6 well plate with 1 mL Matrigel (supplemented with RGD fragment)
Aspirate media from cells in culture.
Wash with 1 mL - 2 mL PBS per well.

Incubate at 37 °C for 00:10:00 to achieve single cells. Individual donor lines exhibit variable sensitivity to accutase-mediated dissociation. Monitor cells regularly to identify when cells achieve single cells.
Collect cells in 5 mL DMEM/F12 and transfer to a 15mL conical tube.
Resuspend cells in mTesR1 supplemented with 5 uM Rock Inhibitor.
Plate several dilutions of cells over the three wells (typically 25 μl, 50 μl and 75 μl in 2 mL of mTesR1).
Freeze down the remaining cells by adding an equal volume of 2x iPSC Freezing Media (20% DMSO in FBS).
